notasTacticas: User input said "Axe break"; resolved conservatively to Axe Beak.

habilidadesResumidas.resumen: Sudden Charge (Ex) When making a charge attack, an axe beak makes a single bite attack. If successful, it may also attempt to trip its opponent as a free action without provoking an attack of opportunity. If the attempt fails, the axe beak cannot be tripped in return.

habilidadesCompletas.texto: Sudden Charge (Ex) When making a charge attack, an axe beak makes a single bite attack. If successful, it may also attempt to trip its opponent as a free action without provoking an attack of opportunity. If the attempt fails, the axe beak cannot be tripped in return.

fullStatBlock:
CR 2
Axe Beak
N Large animal
Init +3
Senses low-light vision; Perception +9
AC 14, touch 12, flat-footed 11 (+3 Dex, +2 natural, -1 size)
hp 22 ((3d8+9))
Fort +6, Ref +6, Will +1
Speed 50 ft.
Melee Bite +5 (1d8+6 piercing)
Special Attacks sudden charge
Special Abilities Sudden Charge (Ex) When making a charge attack, an axe beak makes a single bite attack. If successful, it may also attempt to trip its opponent as a free action without provoking an attack of opportunity. If the attempt fails, the axe beak cannot be tripped in return.
Spell-Like Abilities none
Statistics Str 18, Dex 17, Con 16, Int 2, Wis 11, Cha 10
Base Atk +2; CMB +7; CMD 20
Feats Run, Skill Focus (Perception)
Skills Perception +9
Environment  temperate plains
Organization solitary, pair, or flock (3-6)
Treasure incidental
Source PFRPG Bestiary 3
